source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
joz'-a-kar, jo-za'-kar (yozakhar, "Yahweh has remembered"; the King James Version Jozachar): Servant and murderer (with Jehozabad)of Joash, king of Judah (2Ki 12:21 (Hebrew 22)); called "Zabad" in 2Ch 24:26. Many manuscripts have "Jozabad" in 2 Kings.

�
